# IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.memoryBased

**Case**

Transferred files will be supplied to the delegate as an `NSData` object.

## Declaration

```swift
case memoryBased
```

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.fileBased**: Transferred files will be saved to disk by the delegate.
